days.weather_note: Very hot — start hike early, carry extra water

trail.name: Lower Galilee Trail (Old)
trail.description: Plan your visit to the Lower Galilee Trail soon? Fun! On Tiuli's Israel travel site, you'll find all the information about the Lower Galilee Trail - how to get there, interesting routes, your updates from the field and the trail map.
